caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a black baseball cap. He wears large over-ear headphones and a gold chain around his neck. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a stand. Behind him is a white wall featuring the repeated text "BOSS HUSTLE" and several black stars. To his right, a blurred sign reads "TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and a red label that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. He shifts his gaze and adjusts his posture slightly, moving his hands from an open position in front of him to a more active gesturing motion toward the right side of the frame.
